name: testWaitScopeGetEyeDiagramAnalysis
title: testWaitScopeGetEyeDiagramAnalysis
syntax: long testWaitScopeGetEyeDiagramAnalysis(ScopeAnalyseHandle handle, message frame, long errorNo, ScopeSerialBitAnalysisViolationData data); // form 1
long testWaitScopeGetEyeDiagramAnalysis(ScopeAnalyseHandle handle, linFrame frame, long errorNo, ScopeSerialBitAnalysisViolationData data); // form 2
long testWaitScopeGetEyeDiagramAnalysis(ScopeAnalyseHandle handle, frFrame frame, long errorNo, ScopeSerialBitAnalysisViolationData data); // form 3
description: Returns the violation data of the eye diagram analysis for the error number.

parameters.name: handle
parameters.description: A unique ID. The same handle must be used as for the eye diagram analysis call with the function testWaitScopePerformEyeDiagramAnalysis

parameters.name: frame
parameters.description: Returns the relevant data for the frame where the error occurred.

parameters.name: errorNo
parameters.description: The error number the data are requested.

parameters.name: data
parameters.description: The serial bit analysis violation data for the error number. See ScopeSerialBitAnalysisViolationData.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
